description: Validate frontmatter and structure of SKILL.md, agent, and rule files after editing

hooks.command: command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/validate_frontmatter.py" || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"⚠ python3 not found — install Python 3.11+ to enable frontmatter validation hook"},"systemMessage":"⚠ python3 not found — install Python 3.11+ to enable frontmatter validation hook"}'
